title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Bata India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Bata India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
